summary: Iteration 7 testing complete: Multi-Month Analysis page (ComparePage) and enriched MonthlyKPI model (~60 fields) both working correctly. Backend 14/14 tests passed. Frontend all features verified.
critical_code_review_comments: ComparePage.js: Well-structured component with date range filtering, aggregated metrics calculation, chart tabs, and data table. Uses useMemo for performance optimization.
MonthlyKPI Model: Enriched with ~60 fields from Supabase schema including funnel metrics, organic leads, trial data, and extended expenses. Good field mapping for migration.
POST /api/monthly-kpis/bulk: Properly handles Supabase field name mapping (e.g., 'salaries' -> 'salaires', 'repairs_and_maintenance' -> 'repairs_maintenance'). Returns import/update counts.
Date Range Selection: Quick shortcuts (3M, 6M, 12M, Tout) work correctly, filtering KPIs by month range. Date selectors use Select components with proper month formatting.
Aggregated Metrics: Summary calculations include total revenue, profit, expenses, profit margin, new members, and average churn. Best/worst month identification works correctly.
Note: Test data cleanup required - TEST-* prefix months from pytest were polluting the data causing 'Invalid Date' display. Cleaned up 13 test records.
seed_data_creation: Test KPIs created during backend testing were cleaned up. 24 valid monthly records remain (2023-01 to 2024-12).
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features verified in iteration 7: (1) ComparePage at /compare with date range selection, quick shortcuts (3M/6M/12M/Tout), aggregated metrics (CA Total, Bénéfice, Dépenses, Marge, Membres, Churn), best/worst month display, 4 chart tabs (Revenus, Membres, Dépenses, KPIs), and monthly data table. (2) MonthlyKPI model enriched with ~60 fields supporting Supabase migration. (3) POST /api/monthly-kpis/bulk endpoint for bulk import with field mapping. (4) Sidebar navigation includes 'Analyse Multi-Mois' link to /compare page. Test credentials: test@crossfit.ch / test123.
